CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2026 Continued To Jul-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The court grants the unopposed motion to approve the Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment. The court finds that the warning required by the settlement is in compliance with Proposition 65 (Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5 to 25249.14); that the award of attorney's fees pursuant to the settlement is reasonable under California law; and that, considering the factors set out in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7, subdivision (b)(2), and the facts asserted in the moving papers, the penalty amount is reasonable. A proposed order and proposed judgment are submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
